name: Red Bean Paste (Korean Kochu Chang)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients well.
2. Serve in a small dish for dipping.
Red bean paste is particularly tasty served with fresh scallions and radishes or added to some soups. Korean kochu chang may be purchased at many Oriental food stores. If it is not available, Japanese miso sauce may be substituted. This recipe is for a more pungent kochu chang than that which comes directly from the jar.
